title: Implement inline script detection
description: Implement InlineDetector with lazy parser init, inlineRules table (bash/sh/zsh -c, eval, python -c, ruby -e, perl -e/-E, node -e/--eval, lua -e), flag-based body extraction, eval handling, heredoc detection from AST, pipeline-aware heredoc, recursive bash parsing with MaxInlineDepth=3, WarnInlineDepthExceeded. Wire into extractor. Unit tests for all inline rules, heredoc, recursion depth, negative cases.

comments.author: Danny Cosson
comments.text: Progress update on otc.4: added inline detection edge-case coverage (eval quoted/unquoted, gcc -c negative, python -c missing arg, ruby -e empty body, heredoc cases). Commit: b6a5021. Inline-focused and full parse test suites pass.

comments.author: Danny Cosson
comments.text: Implementation complete and ready for review. Inline detector + ParseAndExtract wiring is in (rules for bash/sh/zsh -c, eval, python/ruby/perl/node/lua; heredoc detection paths; recursion depth warning). Validation: go test ./... and go test -race ./internal/parse passed. Latest code commit: b6a5021.

comments.author: Danny Cosson
comments.text: Reviewer approved otc.4 (b6a5021/a2d110f). Closing bead as complete.
